name: The White House
subject: ‘Six months ago, we unleashed an economic miracle’
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9629f77f04f473be6b2838240caedc5f593c0df80b91f772838aabfa97df11711487b6223c72f71d9f71a6a7167579a6dd02ea069482ae11

The White House - July 2, 2018

The Day Ahead

President Donald J. Trump welcomes Prime Minister Mark Rutte of the Netherlands to discuss trade, investment, and shared defense and security goals.

'Six months ago, we unleashed an economic miracle'

"The biggest tax cuts in American history," President Trump said Friday at a celebration of December's Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. "It's my great honor to welcome you back to the White House to celebrate six months of new jobs, bigger paychecks, and keeping more of your hard-earned money where it belongs, in your pocket or wherever else you want to spend it."

The results are in: The economy is booming and confidence is soaring. Fifty-four percent of Americans rate the economy as good or excellent, the highest ever recorded by CNBC. Businesses repatriated $300 million held overseas in early 2018—another record.

This economic miracle gets less press than it should. Why? Because the tax-cuts boom is proving the President's alarmist critics flat-out wrong. "What has been sold as a job creator and wage booster will, of course, do little of either," Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) claimed. "We are very probably looking at a global recession, with no end in sight," liberal economist Paul Krugman said the day after President Trump's election.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9629f77f04f473be1aa156cb2a2e366a02245806b70060fa822fc8f13f435f7572bc521ce342806d599714d28eb69bda324e4c69fb12652b
See the numbers: 6 months in, tax reform delivers an economic resurgence.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9629f77f04f473be19b076709bb013d46c60dac886c933ccff504bed3522613b510acd3b3d9b1fbe64e42c5298ab7c131a59a8ee736f1591
President Trump's speech celebrating the anniversary of tax cuts.

Vice President Pence: 'This exodus must end'

Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence returned home Friday from a trip last week to South and Central America. "Productive discussions on isolating Venezuela's brutal dictatorship and on solving the crisis of illegal immigration on our southern border," the Vice President tweeted.

Three Central American leaders—Presidents Jimmy Morales of Guatemala, Salvador Sanchez Ceren of El Salvador, and Juan Orlando Hernandez of Honduras—met with Vice President Pence Thursday to discuss the burgeoning migrant crisis. "I say with great respect to the Presidents gathered here: This exodus must end," Vice President Pence said. "Just as we respect your borders and your sovereignty, we insist that you respect ours."

The Vice President also met with families displaced by the Volcan de Fuego eruption in Guatemala, pledging America's continued support for the victims.

name: Action Petition from TimKaine.com
subject: Tell Congress: Protect the Civil Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

54 years ago today, the Civil Rights Act of 1964 was signed into law. This landmark piece of legislation ended segregation in public places and banned employment discrimination on the basis of race, color, religion, sex or national origin.

It also paved the way for the Voting Rights Act, the Fair Housing Act, and the Americans with Disabilities Act. This legislation was a huge step towards America fulfilling the promise of equality for all.

**But right now, key parts of the Civil Rights Act are at risk of being undone. We can 't let that happen.**

Tim and Democratic leaders across the country are standing up to protect the fundamental civil rights of every American.

[Show you're with them: Add your name and tell Congress to pass legislation protecting our civil rights >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1244/3e0906/68383521/3e35baa3/3258992318/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-civil-rights?source=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Show+yoursquore+with+them+Add+your+name+&utm_campaign=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act")

Republicans are working hard to undermine many of the protections created by the Civil Rights Act and the important laws that came behind it.

**And with the Supreme Court hanging in the balance, whether they 're able to succeed in stripping away all the progress America has made will depend on if Democrats take back the House and Senate in [November.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1244/3e0906/68383521/3e35baa2/3258992318/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-civil-rights?source=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November&utm_campaign=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act")**

Every debate, every law, and every confirmation hearing matters.

[Let lawmakers know where you stand: Sign on and tell Congress to work to protect all of our civil rights.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1244/3e0906/68383521/3e35baa1/3258992318/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-civil-rights?source=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Let+lawmakers+know+where+you+stand+Sign+&utm_campaign=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act") | [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1244/3e0906/68383521/3e35baa0/3258992318/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-civil-rights?source=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180702_1_PET_TEAM_Civil-Rights-Act")

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: We have 30 women running to replace 30 Republicans who voted to repeal Obamacare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c427d/24c69fd9/18d89cf02/1883618c/2663465218/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES01N_digital_email_20180702_DecidingDean_inact&source=WQEFES01N_digital_email_20180702_DecidingDean_inact")
---

Peter,

A year ago this month, Dean Heller earned his moniker: "Deciding Vote" Dean.

He was one of the last votes Senate Republicans needed to advance their Obamacare repeal bill to the floor of the Senate.

At the last minute, the measure was defeated, but not before Heller -- and dozens of his fellow Republicans -- voted to strip health care away from millions of Americans.

That's why we've endorsed 28 women in the House and two in the Senate to replace Republicans who voted to repeal Obamacare -- because that's a vote they _deserve_ to lose their seats over.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to replace Republicans who voted to repeal Obamacare.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c427d/24c69fd9/18d89cf02/1883618d/2663465218/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180702_email_DecidingDean?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFES01N_digital_email_20180702_DecidingDean_inact&source=WQEFES01N_digital_email_20180702_DecidingDean_inact")**

It's been almost a year since that vote, but the GOP is STILL intent on repealing Obamacare.

House Republicans announced a budget proposal at the end of last month that could allow them to repeal the law -- potentially without a single Democratic vote -- and it slashes more than $2 trillion from Medicare, Medicaid, and other health care programs.

We have to stop them.

Dozens of women have stepped up to run for Congress, and we're going to help elect as many of them as possible in November.

name: Bill McKibben
subject: We need to act Collectively, Decisively, and Fast
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
I've been studying the climate for decades now. My colleagues and I have written about global warming, its causes and the impact on the world's climate.
#
Friend,
I've been studying the climate for decades now. My colleagues and I have written about global warming, its causes and the impact on the world's climate. I believe it is important that we all understand that we are now facing a CLIMATE CRISIS.
The Sanders Institute and I, as a Founding Fellow, have created a series of videos that explain the current situation and the future implications. For the next six weeks, we will address different aspects of the problem and suggest ways we can work together to turn things around.
[**Our first video provides an overview of climate change, how we got where we are, and what we can do now.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa76/bed43eb/6511f878/75fd338d/1688030028/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-climate-crisis")
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa76/bed43eb/6511f878/75fd338d/1688030028/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-climate-crisis")
Addressing this climate crisis will not be easy - but it is essential for our future, our children's future, and the future of generations to come.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: No Gag Rule: Save Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Add your name to our petition to stop the Title X gag rule.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78fb6/2f5ea88d/77d4fc1c/2cbc18fd/3782945276/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-title-x") Friend, Imagine you're a doctor. Imagine you're consulting with a patient who's facing a difficult health decision. You have two options: withhold information from her or give her an honest answer about all of her options -- and lose all of your funding. This is the impossible situation -- know as the "gag rule" -- the Trump administration has placed on our doctors. By announcing that he's gutting Title X, the only federal grant program dedicated to funding family planning and preventive health services, President Trump has effectively defunded Planned Parenthood. Planned Parenthood isn't about to lie to families facing challenging decisions. **This is an outrageous and dangerous situation. We must fight back now to protect women's health. That's why I've joined with progressives from across the country to start a petition to save Planned Parenthood. Will you add your name next to mine?** [**Add Your Name to Tell Trump: Stop the Title X Gag Rule!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78fb6/2f5ea88d/77d4fc1c/2cbc18fd/3782945276/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-title-x") We know what happens when Planned Parenthood is defunded. It not only means that people have fewer options for birth control and family planning, but it also means that they are suddenly limited in their ability to get access to cancer screenings and general health care. Defunding Planned Parenthood strips access to preventative care from _everyone_. The accessible health care that Planned Parenthood can offer makes it a trusted medical provider for tens of thousands of Washingtonians of all genders, and a necessary advocate for women to make their own reproductive decisions. We will not stand for efforts to tear it down. The Trump administration may believe they can gag organizations like Planned Parenthood from providing essential health care services, but we're going to keep fighting until these constant attacks are ended once and for all. If President Trump insists on using Title X as a weapon against women, we WILL make sure they hear our voices. [**Join me: Add your name to demand that Trump reverse this terrible decision. We must keep fighting for a woman's right to make her own health decisions -- and for health care access for all. We have to save Planned Parenthood.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78fb6/2f5ea88d/77d4fc1c/2cbc18fd/3782945276/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-title-x") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78fb6/2f5ea88d/77d4fc1c/2cbc18fd/3782945276/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-title-x")

name: Austin Petersen
subject: I owe you a big thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, I want to start this week’s campaign update by thanking you for everything you’ve done for the campaign. I know my staff and I bugged you a lot last week for our end-of-quarter fundraising goal (don’t worry - this isn’t a fundraising email). But I want you to know that we crushed our goal of online donors and we have the campaign war chest we need to take down Josh Hawley in August. I could not do this without your help. Thank you so much. Now let me catch you up with everything going on in the campaign. **Jefferson County Circuit Clerk Mike Reuter endorses campaign:** I have been chatting with Mike Reuter for some time now and am honored to receive his endorsement. The endorsements keep coming in! Mike is a great man and if you live in Jefferson County I encourage you to vote him as well in his election. Here is what Mike had to say about our campaign: [](https://www.austinpetersen.com/endorse?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070218_update&n=1) If you would like to endorse our campaign, [**please click here to do so.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/endorse?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070218_update&n=2) **Campaign stop in St. Louis:** I recently spent some time St.Louis meeting with voters and making a couple of campaign stops. Jeff decided to put this campaign stop on Facebook Live. Our message is resonating with Wisconsinites around our state – and it’s spreading quickly. I want to make sure you’re keeping up. ** As our campaign continues to ramp up, and I collect support from more Wisconsin leaders like Congressman Duffy, I want to make sure my list of people I can count on is completely up-to-date. I need to be sure your name is on the list ASAP. Thanks, Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend - I’m sick and tired of seeing reforms that can really help American families die in the U.S. Senate. The Senate Democrats will do everything they can to stop us from passing President Trump’s agenda. What’s really embarrassing is that one of the chief obstructionists is our own senator, Tammy Baldwin. And, friend, I think it’s time we told her enough is enough. Wisconsinites need strong leaders to represent our values in Washington. We need another senator who will fight for lower taxes, secure borders, and our Constitution. What conservative reform in Wisconsin has Leah not been at the center of? She stood with Governor Walker to pass Act 10, balanced our budget and helped us reach record-low unemployment. We don’t have to question whether Leah will fight with President Trump for Wisconsin. She has already proven that in the face of unprecedented intimidation tactics she will stand up to the angry, unhinged left. Leah Vukmir is the champion Wisconsinites can count on to be a voice for us in Washington, unafraid to speak her mind and do what she knows to be right. I am confident that Leah will keep up the fight and accept nothing but the best for all of us. Friend, I hope you will take a moment to join me in – the fighter Wisconsin needs. Make sure you do it soon – we want to make sure this wave of support is strong, and send a message to Senator Baldwin: Watch out for Leah. Sean Duffy Paid for by Leah for Senate

Friends,

I just wanted to reach out quickly and say thank you.

From the beginning of this campaign, I knew that we would be the underdogs in the race. But thanks to your incredible generosity, support, and commitment to making Florida a better place for all of us, we hit our end-of-quarter goal.

This weekend, I spent my time at the Leadership Blue conference in South Florida and joined together with Democrats across the state. And not only was it a great experience connecting with progressives who shared my same values, but I was also able to lead productive conversations on how we can move Florida forward.

Just yesterday R. Jai and I toured our new Miami Gardens field office, which will open soon, and our volunteers are talking to voters about why they're supporting us in this campaign to take back Florida.
---
Listen, you can come from the bottom and get to the top with heart, work, and a commitment to everyday working people. That's how we're going to win -- and we're well-positioned and ready to take on my opponents this August and again in November.

You're the reason this campaign is possible at all -- and I cannot thank you enough for your help.

Bring it home,

Andrew

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
However, our fight is far from over. President Trump and Vice President Pence are raising huge sums for Republican Rep. Mike Braun, and far-right super PACs are attacking me on the airwaves. So it's v |
---

| | Peter,

We just passed our first fundraising deadline of the general election. We'll release the official report later this month, but thanks to the incredible generosity of our grassroots supporters (many of whom gave as little as $1), we were able to hit our goal! **Thank you.**

However, our fight is far from over. President Trump and Vice President Pence are raising huge sums for Republican Rep. Mike Braun, and far-right super PACs are attacking me on the airwaves. So it's very likely I'll have to ask you for a contribution soon.

Asking for money is never fun (in fact, it's the worst part of the job!), but I'm campaigning so hard because **I believe the work we 're doing matters.** Here's what we accomplished since last July:
* **We saved the Affordable Care Act** and preserved care for over 400,000 Hoosiers.
* We successfully got **" Right to Try"** legislation signed into law, which allows people with terminal illnesses to try experimental treatments.
* We got funding to **combat the opioid crisis** included in the Farm Bill, and I won't let it be signed into law without that funding included.
* We secured a spot on the National Mall for the **National Desert Storm War Memorial.**
* We enacted legislation to improve mental health services for law enforcement.
* We acted to **protect young athletes** from abuses like the horrifying scandal that occurred on USA Gymnastics' watch. We're responsible for ensuring that such abuses and the failure to properly report them never happen again.

I'm proud of the difference we've made for Hoosiers this year, but I'm fighting every day to do more. So thank you again for your support -- I hope I can count on you throughout this campaign and while I'm in the Senate over the next six years, too.

\-- Joe

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman_Ra=C3=BAl_Grijalva?=
subject: Add your name if you agree: It's time to reunite children with their parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Trump created this horrific crisis, and the trauma he inflicted upon thousands of children and families will not soon be forgotten.
---
My district in Arizona spans hundreds of miles along our southern border -- and what we have seen unfold there over the past several weeks is unthinkable.

Trump created this horrific crisis by implementing his zero-tolerance policy, and the trauma he inflicted upon thousands of children and families will not soon be forgotten. He is using children as bargaining chips to push through his other draconian immigration policies.

On Saturday there were nationwide protests to oppose Trump's separation of families, and last week a federal judge ordered the reunification of families within 30 days.

**We must demand that the Trump administration immediately end its zero-tolerance policy and begin the process of reuniting children with their parents. Add your name if you agree.**

[ I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521187/4067b0a/66ba96774/7fb01751/282719610/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/reunite-families?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180702_rg_cong&source=em_20180702_rg_cong&refcode=em_20180702_rg_cong")
The family-separation policy at the border was fueled by hatred, bigotry, and fearmongering. It is outrageous that Trump is exploiting children by tearing them apart from their parents -- all in an attempt to get his border wall built.

No more lies. No more jeopardizing the lives of children. For our nation's sake and for the sake of these children, we need immediate action to bring these families back together.

**[Tell the Trump administration to reunite the families who they separated at the border.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521187/4067b0a/66ba96774/7fb0175e/282719610/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/reunite-families?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Tell+the+Trump+administration+to+reunite&utm_campaign=em_20180702_rg_cong&source=em_20180702_rg_cong&refcode=em_20180702_rg_cong")**

We must bring an end to this cruelty at our border -- it will only happen if we stand together and demand it.

In solidarity,

Raul Grijalva

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Add Your Name: The Senate must not vote on any nominee for the Supreme Court until the special counsel's investigation into Donald Trump and his campaign has concluded.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
When a president is under investigation, they should not be allowed to make an appointment to the Supreme Court. Period.
#
**Add Your Name: The Senate must not vote on any nominee for the Supreme Court until the special counsel 's investigation into Donald Trump and his campaign has concluded.**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e5c/6e822e2f/1b023574/417267e8/660053985/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/trump-scotus?source=em180702-full")
Peter -
When a president is under investigation, they should not be allowed to make an appointment to the Supreme Court. Period.
It would be an unprecedented move to pack our nation's highest court during an investigation into the legitimacy of the presidency. It has never happened before -- not with Bill Clinton, not with Richard Nixon, and not with Andrew Johnson.
**And it cannot happen today while Donald Trump and his campaign are under investigation.**
Any appointment before the investigation is concluded will call the legitimacy of the Supreme Court into question. We are already in the midst of a Constitutional crisis, and this would only worsen the situation. We need you to sign our petition to help us stop it:
**[Add Your Name: The Senate must not vote on any nominee for the Supreme Court until the special counsel's investigation into Donald Trump and his campaign has concluded.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e5c/6e822e2f/1b023574/417267e8/660053985/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/trump-scotus?source=em180702-full")**
Voting on a nominee from Donald Trump at this moment would further undermine our democracy.
The next justice will likely be asked to rule on questions related to Donald Trump's businesses, his corruption, his pardons and perhaps the basic legitimacy of his administration. We do not know what Robert Mueller and his team have uncovered already or might uncover soon, and that is the fundamental problem.
Throughout history, Supreme Court justices have had the good sense not to step down while there are questions about a president's legitimacy. In fact, some justices have remained on the court despite significant health challenges in order to avoid a crisis just like the one we face today.
Now history will be the judge of Justice Kennedy and his legacy, but today, it is the job of the Senate to make sure no appointee gets a vote until the investigation into Trump's campaign is complete.
The future of our democracy depends on us. So please, make your voices heard on this today.
Best,
Zephyr

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tell my colleagues in the United States Senate that you are more committed than ever to passing a Medicare for all, single-payer health care system. Add your name and I will carry your message with me whenever anyone asks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Make absolutely no mistake about it, our ideas are winning.
#
Friends -
Not long ago, the idea that health care should be a **_right_** for every man, woman and child in this country was considered “radical” or “fringe” by members of the corporate media and political establishment.
When I introduced my Medicare for all legislation in 2013, I couldn’t find a single Senator to co-sponsor the bill. We were even relentlessly attacked for the idea before the Iowa Caucuses in 2015.
But today Medicare for all is a mainstream position in the Democratic Party. My bill has 16 co-sponsors in the Senate, and a version of the legislation has the support of a majority of Democrats in the House. Public polls conducted by nonpartisan organizations show a full 75 percent of Democratic voters support Medicare for all.
**Make absolutely no mistake about it, our ideas are winning.**
And would you like to know why so many of my colleagues now support Medicare for all? It’s because you support Medicare for all, and because you have been willing to take action in unprecedented numbers in support of the legislation.
That is the political revolution.
Now, from time-to-time, my colleagues who have yet to co-sponsor our bill will ask me if there is still the energy out there for Medicare for all that there was during our campaign. Those questions have only increased as President Trump continues his efforts to sabotage the Affordable Care Act.
The next time one of them asks, I want to be able to say our movement is only getting stronger. And if I can do that, and if they believe it, it won’t be long before our list of co-sponsors grows:
**[Add Your Name: Tell my colleagues in the United States Senate that you are more committed than ever to passing a Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care system. Click this link to sign my petition, and I will carry your message with me whenever anyone asks.](https://act.berniesanders.com/sign/mfa_petition?source=em-ipwarmup-180702&t=1&akid=11%2E150750%2E7PxoPO)**
All of us get sick.
All of us need medicine.
All of us have accidents.
All of us need good quality health care.
**And in my view, the function of a rational health care system in this country should be to provide quality care for everyone in a cost-effective way, not to make health industry CEOs richer or drive up stock prices on Wall Street.**
Unfortunately, even as support for Medicare for all grows, we are still taking on much of the political and financial establishment in this fight. The insurance companies and drug companies in this country are extraordinarily powerful, and they are not going down without a fight.
If we are serious about providing high-quality and affordable health care, the only real solution is a Medicare-for-all, single-payer system that provides health care to **ALL** Americans, including the 50 million uninsured and underinsured in this country.
Help me send that message to my colleagues today:
**[Add Your Name: Tell my colleagues in the United States Senate that you are more committed than ever to passing a Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care. Click this link to sign my petition, and I will carry your message with me whenever anyone asks.](https://act.berniesanders.com/sign/mfa_petition?source=em-ipwarmup-180702&t=2&akid=11%2E150750%2E7PxoPO)**
Sisters and Brothers: In this pivotal moment in American history, let us lead our country forward to guarantee health care as a right and not a privilege. This is a struggle whose time has come. This is a struggle not just about health care but about the heart and soul of our country, about what we stand for as a people.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

Hi Peter,

Join us for a Weekend of Action THIS Saturday and Sunday, July 7 and 8! We are mobilizing in every corner of Indiana to talk to Hoosiers about why it's critical we have Joe's commonsense voice in the Senate.

**[Sign up here and we'll let you know where the closest event to you is>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ee0/7377f838/3d13ebb7/51f9c9da/2579525710/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/join-us-for-a-weekend-of-action")**

We'll be going door-to-door across the state -- you won't want to miss it! There's a lot at stake in this election, and we need to make sure every Hoosier knows how critical it is.

We will win in November -- up and down the ballot -- if we can get out and talk to every voter, but we need your help. If you're ready to help make a difference in this election, please **[sign up to join us this weekend.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ee0/7377f838/3d13ebb7/51f9c9da/2579525710/VEsC/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/join-us-for-a-weekend-of-action")**
